scripts.db:deploy: [ -f .env ] && set -a && . ./.env && set +a; pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate: [ -f .env ] && set -a && . ./.env && set +a; pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: [ -f .env ] && set -a && . ./.env && set +a; pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:studio: [ -f .env ] && set -a && . ./.env && set +a; pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma studio
